title: Slamtec Aurora ROS SDK
summary: Official Aurora ROS SDK repository with ROS/ROS2 branches and slamware server node connectivity workflow. Primary source for Aurora topic semantics and launch conventions.
exact_file_paths_line_ranges: README.md (repo root); ros2 branch docs to inspect
recommended_integration_actions: Track upstream ros2 branch updates; align local launch parameters and frame conventions.

title: Nav2 Documentation
summary: Production-grade ROS2 navigation stack docs covering lifecycle, behavior trees, planners, controllers, and recoveries. Critical for object-relative approach and robust recoveries.
exact_file_paths_line_ranges: Concepts + Plugins + Recovery behavior docs pages
recommended_integration_actions: Use BT Navigator with custom subtree for tire approach and reacquisition recovery hooks.

title: micro-ROS Homepage
summary: micro-ROS architecture and tooling for MCU integration with ROS2. Suitable for replacing ad-hoc serial parsing with typed DDS endpoints on ESP32.
recommended_integration_actions: Evaluate migration path from JSON UART to micro-ROS pub/sub for wheel odom and motor command APIs.

title: Ultralytics YOLO
summary: Widely used YOLO framework with export to ONNX and TensorRT pathways. Includes model families and deployment guidance relevant to Jetson acceleration.
recommended_integration_actions: Pin compatible model version, export to ONNX, benchmark TensorRT FP16 and optionally INT8 with validation gates.

title: NVIDIA CUDA-PointPillars
summary: TensorRT-oriented PointPillars inference implementation with Orin performance references. Strong baseline for real-time 3D vehicle detection on Jetson.
recommended_integration_actions: Prototype offline inference on Aurora pointcloud schema; add ROS2 wrapper and latency profiler.

title: CenterPoint 3D Detection and Tracking
summary: Research-grade but influential center-based 3D detection and tracking with known TensorRT conversion forks. Useful for multi-object tracking and persistent IDs.
recommended_integration_actions: Use as algorithm reference and evaluate maintained TensorRT forks for production feasibility on Orin.

title: Waveshare UGV Rover Jetson Orin ROS2
summary: Vendor hardware integration references for Jetson UGV ROS2 wiring, serial/motor setup, and launch practices.
recommended_integration_actions: Use as implementation and validation reference in Jetson integration work.

title: robot_localization
summary: Canonical ROS package for fusing odometry/IMU/pose into stable state estimate for Nav2 and mission planning.
recommended_integration_actions: Use as implementation and validation reference in Jetson integration work.

title: NVIDIA TensorRT Docs
summary: Primary reference for ONNX to TensorRT optimization, precision trade-offs, and deployment tooling.
recommended_integration_actions: Use as implementation and validation reference in Jetson integration work.

title: Jetson Downloads and JetPack
summary: Authoritative source for JetPack compatibility and system images affecting CUDA/TensorRT stack.
recommended_integration_actions: Use as implementation and validation reference in Jetson integration work.

title: ROS2 lifecycle and SQLite persistence references
summary: Reference for managed node state transitions and persistence-friendly lifecycle behavior in ROS2 mission services.
recommended_integration_actions: Adopt lifecycle-safe startup/resume and persistent state transitions for mission manager.

title: Nav2 RecoveryNode retry patterns
summary: Canonical retry control pattern for planner/controller recoveries and bounded retries in Nav2 behavior trees.
recommended_integration_actions: Mirror bounded retry semantics in tire approach and final alignment recoveries.
